{{Expand}}

{{Infobox location
| name = Dornoth I
| introduced = The Pilot
}}

== The Pilot ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-04-the-pilot|[[Dornoth I]] is a place where ugly things occur.<ref name="lh-04-the-pilot-c37">''The Pilot'', chapter 37</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Locations]]
[[Category:The Pilot]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon locations]]
